hooks.command: case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*) if command -v powershell >/dev/null 2>&1; then ps=powershell; elif command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then ps=pwsh; else ps=; fi;; *) if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then ps=pwsh; else ps=; fi;; esac; d="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}/plugin-data"; if [ -n "$ps" ]; then "$ps" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/marketplace-update.ps1" -Agent claude || true; else mkdir -p "$d" 2>/dev/null; printf '%s  [claude] PowerShell (pwsh/powershell) not found on PATH; skipping urikan-ai-marketplace auto-update on this platform.\n' "$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z 2>/dev/null)" >> "$d/urikan-ai-marketplace-auto-updater.log" 2>/dev/null; true; fi
